text: Realme's earbuds are crazy for providing sound quality, bass quality and all other features in the budget of Rs 2500. This is all new Realme Buds T500 Pro which comes with 3 colour options with a box packaging like this with 50db active noise cancellation, 12.4mm Hi-Res audio drivers for deep bass, 56 hours long lasting battery backup, 3 mics for calling and stylish and compact candy box design these earbuds fit easily anywhere. For connectivity and fast pairing, it has Bluetooth version 6.1 and it can be connected with 3 devices. So in this pricing, stylish, compact, design, bass, sound quality and all other features are on point. You can check it out by clicking here.
